title: crataegus crus-galli angustifolia
intro: Crataegus crus-galli angustifolia, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to promote digestion, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. The health benefits of Crataegus crus-galli angustifolia include improving cardiovascular health, reducing cholesterol levels, and aiding in the management of type 2 diabetes. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal effects.
